code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an athlete (or related entities) into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Build entity graph to link related triples
    subject_triples = {}
    object_triples = {}
    for triple in triples:
        subj = triple.subject
        obj = triple.object
        if subj not in subject_triples:
            subject_triples[subj] = []
        subject_triples[subj].append(triple)
        if obj not in object_triples:
            object_triples[obj] = []
        object_triples[obj].append(triple)

    # Generate phrasing for predicates - improved with better natural language
    def format_clause(triple, is_relative=False, entity_prefix=None):
        s, p, o = triple.subject, triple.predicate.lower(), triple.object

        phrasing_map = {
            "birthDate": lambda: f"was born on {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} was born on {o}",
            "birthYear": lambda: f"was born in {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} was born in {o}",
            "birthPlace": lambda: f"was born in {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} was born in {o}",
            "height": lambda: f"is {o} metres tall" if is_relative else f"{s} is {o} metres tall",
            "weight": lambda: f"weighs {o} kilograms" if is_relative else f"{s} weighs {o} kilograms",
            "league": lambda: f"plays in the {o} league" if is_relative else f"{s} plays in the {o} league",
            "club": lambda: f"played for {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} played for {o}",
            "currentclub": lambda: f"currently plays for {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
            "currentteam": lambda: f"currently plays for {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
            "position": lambda: f"plays as a {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} plays as a {o}",
            "manager": lambda: f"is managed by {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} is managed by {o}",
            "coach": lambda: f"is coached by {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} is coached by {o}",
            "owner": lambda: f"is owned by {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} is owned by {o}",
            "city": lambda: f"is based in {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} is based in {o}",
            "country": lambda: f"which is in {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} is from {o}",
            "isPartOf": lambda: f"is part of {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} is part of {o}",
            "season": lambda: f"participated in the {o} season" if is_relative else f"{s} participated in the {o} season",
            "foundingDate": lambda: f"was founded on {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} was founded on {o}",
            "utcOffset": lambda: f"has a UTC offset of {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} has a UTC offset of {o}",
            "timeZone": lambda: f"is in the {o} time zone" if is_relative else f"{s} is in the {o} time zone",
            "areaTotal": lambda: f"covers an area of {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} covers an area of {o}",
            "demonym": lambda: f"people are called {o}" if is_relative else f"The people of {s} are called {o}",
            "language": lambda: f"the language is {o}" if is_relative else f"The language of {s} is {o}",
            "officialLanguage": lambda: f"the official language is {o}" if is_relative else f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
            "anthem": lambda: f"the national anthem is {o}" if is_relative else f"The national anthem of {s} is {o}",
            "leader": lambda: f"is led by {o}" if is_relative else f"The leader of {s} is {o}",
            "leaderTitle": lambda: f"the leader title is {o}" if is_relative else f"The leader title of {s} is {o}",
            "mostChampions": lambda: f"the team with most championships is {o}" if is_relative else f"The team with the most championships is {o}",
            "currency": lambda: f"the currency is {o}" if is_relative else f"The currency of {s} is {o}",
            "ground": lambda: f"with ground in {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} has its ground in {o}",
            "stadium": lambda: f"playing at {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} plays at {o}",
            "draftTeam": lambda: f"was drafted by {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} was drafted by {o}",
            "draftYear": lambda: f"was drafted in {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} was drafted in {o}",
            "draftPick": lambda: f"was drafted as pick {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} was drafted as pick {o}",
            "draftRound": lambda: f"was drafted in round {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} was drafted in round {o}",
            "debutTeam": lambda: f"made their debut with {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} made their debut with {o}",
            "formerTeam": lambda: f"previously played for {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} previously played for {o}",
            "playerNumber": lambda: f"wears jersey number {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} wears jersey number {o}",
            "college": lambda: f"attended {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} attended {o}",
            "youthclub": lambda: f"played youth football for {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} played youth football for {o}",
            "activeYearsStartYear": lambda: f"started their career in {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} started their career in {o}",
            "deathPlace": lambda: f"died in {o}" if is_relative else f"{s} died in {o}",
        }

        if p in phrasing_map:
            return phrasing_map[p]()
        else:
            return f"{s} {p} {o}"

    # Find main subject (most frequently appearing as subject)
    main_subject = max(subject_triples.keys(), key=lambda x: len(subject_triples[x]))

    # Build connected sentence
    main_clauses = []
    relative_clauses = []
    visited_entities = set()

    # Process main subject's triples
    if main_subject in subject_triples:
        for triple in subject_triples[main_subject]:
            clause = format_clause(triple)
            main_clauses.append((clause, triple.object))
            visited_entities.add(triple.object)

    # Find related entities and link them
    for clause, entity in main_clauses:
        if entity in subject_triples:
            for related_triple in subject_triples[entity]:
                if related_triple not in [t for t in triples if t.subject == main_subject]:
                    relative_clause = format_clause(related_triple, is_relative=True)
                    relative_clauses.append((entity, relative_clause))

    # Build final sentence
    if len(main_clauses) == 1 and not relative_clauses:
        sentence = main_clauses[0][0] + "."
    elif len(main_clauses) == 1:
        base = main_clauses[0][0]
        # Add relative clauses
        relative_text = []
        for entity, rel_clause in relative_clauses:
            if "which" not in rel_clause and "with" not in rel_clause.lower():
                rel_clause = f"which {rel_clause.lower()}"
            relative_text.append(rel_clause)
        if relative_text:
            sentence = base + ", " + ", ".join(relative_text) + "."
        else:
            sentence = base + "."
    else:
        # Multiple main clauses - join with proper connectors
        base_parts = [c[0] for c in main_clauses]
        if len(relative_clauses) > 0:
            # Attach relative clauses to the first entity
            first_entity = main_clauses[0][1]
            for i, (entity, rel_clause) in enumerate(relative_clauses):
                if entity == first_entity and i == 0:
                    base_parts[0] = base_parts[0] + ", " + rel_clause
        sentence = ", ".join(base_parts[:-1]) + ", and " + base_parts[-1] + "."

    # Capitalize first character
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
